variables.remittance: Workers' remittances (NPR in millions) - monthly, non-cumulative
variables.exchange_rate: Monthly average middle exchange rate (NPR per USD)
variables.oil_price: Placeholder - needs to be filled from external source (e.g., World Bank, FRED)
variables.dofe_departures: Monthly migrant worker departures approved by DOFE (available from Aug 2012)

notes: Remittance data extracted from NRB BPM5 Table, Row 32
Fiscal year conversion: Aug-Jul mapped to calendar years
DOFE data only available from August 2012 onwards
August 2023 remittance value corrected (was negative due to cumulative conversion)
